title: True Survival
description: True Survival Mode is a comprehensive set of 1.21+ datapack features that aim to overhaul Minecraft's survival mode. It tackles difficulty and progression through means that don't disrupt Minecraft's regular gameplay, while also providing new adventures!
body:
True Survival aims to do a few things.

---- 📝 SUMMARY 📝 1) Emphasize the survival aspects of Minecraft without detracting from its more creative features. 2) Fill the holes in features that Mojang has left behind. 3) Make Minecraft a heart-pounding experience that alludes to Minecraft's oldest versions.
📚 INFO 📚
🧩Compatibility🧩

True Survival is compatible with the latest versions, including 1.21 and 1.21.1. If you wish to access unsupported, legacy versions, visit [here]

🎨Optional Resource Pack🎨

True Survival is designed to have its resource pack completely optional. Immersion and gameplay does not require it (However the resource pack IS recommended). To download, click [here].

---- ⚔️ FEATURES ⚔️ True Survival mode features a cohesive rework of the healing, hunger, and lighting systems, in addition to many difficulty tweaks, quality of life changes, and all new mechanics! You'll see things like healing campfires, skeletons that swap weapons, a reworked Ender Dragon fight, and much more.
🔎Wiki🔍

The Wiki is the most updated resource for features and information. Click [here] to learn more.

📺Video Showcase📺

The latest video showcase is currently a couple minor updates behind. Click [here] to learn more.
